creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Configuration option defaults: <https://www.freshports.org/www/firefox/#config>

(In reply to George Mitchell from comment #0 and comment #3)

Do any other installed packages vary from the defaults?


<https://freetestdata.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/02/Free_Test_Data_1MB_MP4.mp4> plays for me with firefox-112.0,2 on 13.2-RC6. 

<https://bsd-hardware.info/?probe=6dabd5d84a>



> … I'm not sure what you are asking, regarding audio. …

The sample file above has no soundtrack.
